rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0001
rows.name:
Brave citizens of New Los Angeles: this is
your director general, Maurice Chausson.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0002
rows.name: I am glad to have reached this day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0003
rows.name:
Because the day has finally come to share
the report we have all been waiting for[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0004
rows.name:
Through the expansion of FrontierNet made
possible by every BLADE's devotion[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0005
rows.name:
we have finally identified where your
bodies are stored: the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Of course, we remain in combat with hostile
alien races,[ST:page p1=90 ] and cannot let our guard down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0007
rows.name: Even so, we now know the place we must reach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0008
rows.name:
Just a little more[ST:wide ]— just a little more, and
we humans will regain our original bodies[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0009
rows.name:
and become one of the forms of
life living on this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Until that day, I ask for
your continued cooperation.[ST:wait ]
